title: Manufacturing Engineer - Nocil South Asia Partners - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Nocil South Asia Partners - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Nocil South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Hyderabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Nocil South Asia Partners:
Nocil South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nocil South Asia Partners!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
